عارف: خواسته‌های آمریکا 'کودکانه.' ایران دور دوم نمی‌آید. ترامپ: 'شاید تمدید نکنم.' معاون رئیس‌جمهور محمد مخبر عارف دور دوم مذاکرات را رد کرد (۱۹ آوریل): 'شروط آمریکا کودکانه و غیرممکن است.' ترامپ (۲۰ آوریل): 'شاید تمدید نکنم — باید دوباره بمب‌ بیندازیم.' مقامات آمریکا به اسلام‌آباد رفتند؛ هیئت ایران سوار نشد.

برنت $۹۵.۴۲ (↑۵.۵۸٪)، هفته پرنوسان: $۹۴.۸۹ → $۸۴ → $۹۰ → $۹۰.۳۸ → $۹۵.۴۲. روز ۴۹: برنت ~۱۱٪ سقوط به $۸۴ (باز شدن هرمز). روز ۵۰: برگشت به $۹۰ (بسته شدن مجدد). روز ۵۱: $۹۰.۳۸. روز ۵۲: $۹۵.۴۲ (توقیف توسکا + ترس انقضای آتش‌بس). WTI ~$۹۱.

اینترنت ایران روز ۵۲ = ۱٬۲۴۸+ ساعت — طولانی‌ترین قطعی در تاریخ ثبت‌شده. بدون اینترنت غیرنظامی از روز اول (۲۸ فوریه). اینترنت کسب‌وکارها جزئی (روزهای ۴۶-۵۲). هرانا: ۱٬۷۰۱+ غیرنظامی تایید شده. لبنان ۲٬۲۹۴+ کشته، ۷٬۰۶۱+ زخمی. آتش‌بس اسرائیل-لبنان (از روز ۴۸) برقرار. کشته‌های آمریکا: ۱۵+.

همگرایی ۴.۹ — سقوط از اوج ۵.۷. تشدید ۵۲٪ (↑↑)، توافق ۱۸٪ (↓↓). D48: ۵.۷ → D49: ۶.۰ → D50: ۴.۸ → D51: ۴.۴ → D52: ۴.۹. تشدید ۵۲٪ = بالاترین از روز ۳۰. توافق ۱۸٪ = پایین‌ترین از آتش‌بس. بن‌بست ۱۵٪، پیروزی ۱۰٪، مداخله ۴٪، شکاف ۱٪.

ریسک‌ها: آتش‌بس فردا ۲۱ آوریل. تهدید تلافی ایران. بدون دور دوم. اگر آتش‌بس بدون توافق یا تمدید منقضی شود: کمپین موشکی/پهپادی ایران احتمالاً ظرف چند ساعت از سر گرفته می‌شود. توقیف توسکا = بهانه‌ای که ایران بهره‌برداری خواهد کرد. خطرناک‌ترین ۲۴ ساعت از روز اول.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D38: fragment est. D39: ceasefire. D40-D52: 0+0 ceasefire/blockade (13 days). D52: ceasefire expires tomorrow. Touska seized. Hormuz re-closed. Iran refuses Round 2.
dailySeries.confidenceNote: 1.0 = JPost verified day-by-day (D1-D10). 0.8 = UAE MoD official scaled (D11). 0.6 = fragment estimates from Gulf reports (D12-D29). 0.5 = latest data, less verified (D30+). 1.0 = ceasefire/blockade confirmed 0 launches (D40-D52).

oil.note: D52 (Apr 20): Brent $95.42 (↑5.58%). D49: crashed ~11% to $84 (Hormuz opening). D50: rebounded $90 (Hormuz re-closed). D51: $90.38. D52: $95.42 (Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry fears). Ceasefire expires tomorrow Apr 21. Escalation 52%. If collapse: $115-125+. If deal: $85-90.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Apr 09 (D41). Ceasefire Day 3. Zero Iranian missiles/drones. Houthi attacks: Maersk Yorktown, Hope Island, MSC Grace F, MSC Gina, 2 US frigates. Israel 100+ sites in Lebanon (254+ killed).

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate down 69% missiles, 74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate down 79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate down 85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate down 90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate down 92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic down 86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic down 90%, drones down 95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than down 90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports down 61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait, Qatar, SAMREF. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones reach Saudi western export infrastructure. Pipeline bypass routes no longer safe.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ DAY 1 — BESSENT 140M BARRELS + NETANYAHU 'IRAN DESTROYED' + TEHRAN STRUCK: Israel hit Tehran on Nowruz. Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed). Saudi 15 drones intercepted. UAE 7 missiles + 15 drones. BESSENT: US may unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil at sea. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72. NETANYAHU claims Iran capability destroyed — directly contradicted by ongoing launches AND IAEA. IRGC desertions at unit level but institutional level disputed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent dropped ~$110 (from $119 intraday D20). BESSENT intervention: 140M barrels. G7 SPR 400M barrels. Saudi (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through April. 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS. Bessent weaponizing oil supply. Netanyahu claiming victory for political off-ramp. IRGC still fighting but fracturing.

dailyRows.primary: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM + DIMONA/ARAD + DIEGO GARCIA + NATANZ: Trump: 'obliterate' power plants if Hormuz not reopened 48 hrs. Iran struck Dimona + Arad — interceptors FAILED — 100+ wounded. Diego Garcia 2 IRBMs (4,000 km). Saudi 38 drones in 3 hrs. IDF fresh Tehran strikes.
dailyRows.capability: D22: 40+75. DIMONA/ARAD = most impactful Israel strike since D1. Interceptors FAILED. Diego Garcia = 4,000 km IRBM. ~40 officials killed. IDF Chief Zamir: 'HALFWAY.'
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112.19 Friday close (highest of war). TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM = most dangerous escalation since D1. Saudi expels military attache. 22-country Hormuz coalition. IEA Birol: 'greatest energy threat in history.'
dailyRows.assessment: FOUR ESCALATIONS COLLIDE: (1) Trump ultimatum vs Iran counter-threat = most dangerous exchange. (2) Dimona/Arad = nuclear tit-for-tat. (3) Diego Garcia = global reach. (4) Saudi expulsion. IDF Zamir: 'HALFWAY' = long war.

dailyRows.primary: 48-HR COUNTDOWN + IDF 200+ TARGETS + IRGC 3RD JET CLAIM: IDF 'wide-scale' strikes (200+ targets, weapons compounds). IRGC: F-16 shot down (3rd fighter jet) + drone intercepted over Tehran. Saudi: 3 ballistic Riyadh + ~60 drones. UAE: 4 ballistic + 25 drones. Iran UN rep: Hormuz 'open to all except enemies.'
dailyRows.capability: D23: 35+70. IRGC claims 200+ coalition aircraft destroyed in 3 weeks. Israel DM Katz: strikes 'INCREASE SIGNIFICANTLY.' Mojtaba absent Day 14.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112 (weekend). 48-hr deadline approaching. Internet Day 23 = longest in Iran history. Lebanon 1,024+. Iran 1,444+ (AJ).
dailyRows.assessment: THE WAIT: War in holding pattern defined by Trump's 48-hr deadline. IDF intensifying not pausing. Iran UN 'open except enemies' = first selective Hormuz framework = potential off-ramp.

dailyRows.primary: TRUMP BLINKS — POSTPONES 5 DAYS + OIL CRASH: Trump called off ultimatum citing 'productive talks.' CBS: FM confirms 'received points through mediators.' UAE 7 ballistic + 16 drones (cumul 352/15/1,789). Saudi 2 ballistic Riyadh + ~20 drones. IRGC attacked 5th Fleet. Zolghadr new SNSC secretary.
dailyRows.capability: D24: 30+55. UAE cumul 352 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,789 drones. IRGC maintaining multi-theater despite talks claim. Israel 92% ballistic interception.
dailyRows.cost: Brent CRASHED $112 to $96.50 (~14%). WTI below $90. Dow surged 1,076 pts. Goldman: $110 avg. 5-day deadline = Friday Mar 28.
dailyRows.assessment: TRUMP BLINKS: 48-hr ultimatum resolved as OPTION B (backs down). Credibility damaged. But off-ramp creates space. Iran dual posture: deny publicly, engage privately. Zolghadr = regime continuity.

dailyRows.primary: LEBANON EXPELS IRAN ENVOY + TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED + MINES IN HORMUZ: Lebanon declared Iranian ambassador persona non grata. Tel Aviv UNINTERCEPTED missile (~220 lb). Maham 3/7 mines confirmed in Hormuz. Saudi ~20 drones. Kuwait intercepting, 7 power lines. IDF struck al-Dalafa Bridge Litani.
dailyRows.capability: D25: 25+50. TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED = critical defense gap. MINES = physical blockade. Hezbollah 865 attack waves. Iran planning Tel Aviv + allies (Fars).
dailyRows.cost: Brent REBOUNDED above $100 — $101.21 (CNBC). Fortune AM $102.47. Goldman: $110 avg; $147 worst case. IEA: 'worse than 73+79.' HRANA: 1,704+ killed. Hospitals 1/3. Internet 552+.
dailyRows.assessment: DIVERGENT SIGNALS: Lebanon expulsion = proxy fracturing. Tel Aviv unintercepted = Iran still dangerous. Mines = Hormuz slow to reopen. Trump 5-day window. Oil rebound = premature optimism corrected.

dailyRows.primary: 15-POINT PEACE PLAN + SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL + 82ND AIRBORNE: Trump admin sent 15-point ceasefire plan via Pakistan (NYT). Iran told UNSC: non-hostile ships can transit with 'prior coordination.' Pakistan Aframax = first non-Iranian transit. 82nd Airborne deploying (2,000-3,000) for Kharg Island. David's Sling MALFUNCTION — 2 ballistic struck southern Israel. Saudi 32 drones + 1 ballistic in 11 hrs. Kuwait airport fuel tank fire. Bahrain: Moroccan civilian killed.
dailyRows.capability: D26: 20+55. SAFE PASSAGE = Iran creating bilateral Hormuz framework. Pakistan tanker transited = physical proof. India traded 3 Iranian tankers for passage. China in talks. IRGC still launching: Saudi 32 drones 11 hrs = sustained. David's Sling malfunction = 2nd interceptor failure in 2 days. 82nd Airborne + 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops = credible Kharg Island threat.
dailyRows.cost: Brent fell ~$99 on peace plan hopes (Fortune $99.75, Investing.com $98.57). WTI ~$89. Iran Health Ministry: 1,500+ killed, 18,551 injured. 82,000+ structures damaged (Red Crescent). Lebanon: 1,072 killed. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. Philippines state of emergency. Japan 30-day reserves. China gas +20%. G7 FM Friday.
dailyRows.assessment: D26 — DUAL-TRACK INFLECTION: 15-point plan = most concrete proposal since D1. Safe passage formal = Hormuz de-escalation signal. 82nd Airborne = ground threat. Iran mocks publicly but engages through intermediaries. David's Sling malfunction. Oil fell on hope.

dailyRows.primary: TANGSIRI KILLED + KHARG FORTIFIED + 7 SALVOS + WH DENIES REJECTION: Israel killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas. Iran fortifying Kharg Island (mines/traps/air defenses — CNN). 7 missile salvos at Israel (first Jerusalem-area sirens, 11 injured). CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed. Iran FM rejected plan but WH Leavitt: 'rejection reports FALSE.' Ghalibaf: attacks if islands occupied. Tasnim: Red Sea front threat.
dailyRows.capability: D27: 25+45. TANGSIRI = most significant naval decapitation. CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed = massive industrial damage. BUT Iran STILL launching 7 salvos/day + fortifying Kharg with mines/traps = preparing for ground war phase. Iran's counter-escalation posture: if you come to our islands, we attack your Gulf allies' infrastructure + open Red Sea front. Safe passage expanding despite Tangsiri death = institutional.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106.12 (+3.8%). Gas $3.981 (first drop). Iran 1,937 killed (AJ). Gulf 25+. UAE 11 dead, 357 ballistic + 1,815 drones cumul. Pew 59% wrong. Ghalibaf + Tasnim threats = Iran deterring Gulf cooperation. GCC 6-country condemnation. WH/Iran contradictory messaging on rejection.
dailyRows.assessment: D27 — FOUR COLLIDING DYNAMICS: (1) TANGSIRI KILLED + Kharg fortified = Iran losing commanders but preparing ground defense. (2) CENTCOM 2/3 destroyed + IDF fait accompli = industrial base being eliminated. (3) WH denies rejection while Iran says 'no negotiations' = contradictory messaging for domestic audiences. (4) Kharg mines/traps + Ghalibaf threat + Tasnim Red Sea = Iran preparing deterrence against ground ops.

dailyRows.primary: ARAK REACTOR + STEEL FACTORIES + PSAB ATTACK: IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor (Khondab) + Yazd uranium processing + Khuzestan Steel + Mobarakeh Steel (IRGC-linked, billions). 50+ IAF jets. Iran hit PSAB: 6 ballistic + 29 drones, 10-15 US troops wounded (2-5 serious), refueling aircraft destroyed + E-3 AWACS damaged. Iran released satellite photos. Trump confirmed April 6 deadline. IRGC vowed corporate retaliation.
dailyRows.capability: D28: 30+55. NUCLEAR ESCALATION — Arak = plutonium production. Yazd = uranium feedstock. Combined with Natanz/Isfahan/Fordow previous strikes = comprehensive nuclear infrastructure targeting. Steel factories = IRGC economic base. Iran STILL launching effectively: PSAB attack = most significant hit on US assets since D12 KC-135 crash.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$108. US total: 13 KIA, ~300 wounded. 162nd Division to S. Lebanon. 2 killed Beirut. Iran: 'no radiation leak.' IRGC threatened industrial companies with American shareholders. Pakistan hosting FM meeting (Turkey, Egypt, Saudi Arabia).
dailyRows.assessment: D28 — NUCLEAR + CORPORATE TARGETING: Israel destroying Iran's nuclear infrastructure AND economic base simultaneously. Iran responding with precision strikes on US military assets + threatening corporate targets = new escalation dimension. April 6 deadline creates 9-day window.

dailyRows.primary: HOUTHIS ENTER WAR + ONE MONTH MARK: Houthis fired ballistic missiles at Israel from Yemen — FIRST since war began. Sirens Beersheba. IDF intercepted. Houthis considering closing Bab al-Mandab. UAE: 20 ballistic + 37 drones (6 injured). Kuwait airport radar significantly damaged. Bahrain fire. Oman port 2 UAVs. G7 joint statement on civilians + Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: D29: 30+55. HOUTHI ENTRY = war's most significant strategic escalation. Opens THIRD front (Hormuz + Lebanon + now Red Sea). If Bab al-Mandab closes: 1/5 global oil + 1/8 global trade blocked simultaneously. UAE cumul ~377 ballistic + ~1,852 drones. CENTCOM: launches down 90% from D1 but new launch axis from Yemen changes calculus entirely.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112.57 (+4.22%) — highest since Jul 2022. WTI $99.64 (briefly $100). +51% in one month. Lebanon 1,142 killed. 330,000+ displaced (UN). G7: 'immediate cessation.' Pakistan FM meeting. Trump: 'not finished, thousands of targets.' Rubio: 'ahead of schedule.'
dailyRows.assessment: D29 — ONE MONTH + HOUTHI ENTRY: War EXPANDING not contracting at one-month mark. Houthi entry threatens second chokepoint. Oil surging. Casualties mounting. G7/international pressure building. Trump April 6 deadline = 9 days to produce results. Contradiction: 'ahead of schedule' vs 'thousands of targets left' vs Houthi entry = no coherent endgame strategy visible.

dailyRows.primary: D30 — HOUTHIS RESUME + PAKISTAN DIPLOMACY: Iran warned against ground invasion. Pakistan hosted FM meeting. Houthis 2nd operation at Israel. UAE 16 ballistic + 42 drones. Kuwait 14+12. Saudi 10 drones. Al Arabiya cumul: 550 ballistic + 300 drones at Israel, 1,119 missiles + 3,792 drones at Gulf.
dailyRows.capability: D30: 35+65. Houthi sustained. UAE cumul ~393+1,894. CENTCOM: 25-35/day stabilizing. Ghalibaf warns ground invasion.

timeline.title: Day 38 LATE (Apr 06) — IRAN 10-POINT COUNTEROFFER
timeline.body: Iran submitted 10-point maximalist counteroffer: permanent end, sanctions lifted, reconstruction, NPT enrichment, Hormuz toll. Trump: 'significant but not good enough.' REFUSES to extend. Iran military: 'helpless, stupid.' Markets surged. Brent $109.53. HRANA 3,540+ (1,616 civilians, 244 children). Internet 936+.

timeline.title: APRIL 7 TUE 8PM ET — <20 HRS
timeline.body: 4th deadline. 3 prior blinks. P(follow-through) UP to 0.22 (Trump explicitly refuses to extend). Iran 10-pt = maximalist gap unbridgeable in hours. If strikes: $130+, 90M without power, Houthi Bab al-Mandab. If blinks: credibility DESTROYED.

timeline.body: US CENTCOM precision strike on >90 military targets on Kharg Island pre-dawn Apr 7. Naval mine storage, missile bunkers, IRGC sites destroyed. Oil terminal infrastructure deliberately untouched (controlled escalation signal). IRGC response: end of restraint on Gulf oil targets.

timeline.title: D39 Apr 7 night — 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE

VP Vance to lead Islamabad peace talks Friday. Iran 10-pt = 'workable basis.' Oil collapsed from $117 intraday to $109.50. Primary collapse risk: Israel unilateral strike (Haaretz source).

timeline.title: D41 Apr 9 — LEBANON FRACTURE POINT
timeline.body: Israel hit 100+ sites in Lebanon in 10 min — largest coordinated strike of the war. 254+ killed. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation. IRGC threatens Hormuz re-block. Parliament: 'STRONG responses.' Zero Iranian attacks D41 — ceasefire holding on Iran side but under extreme stress. Brent rebounding $97.39. Talks moved to Saturday Apr 12 (Vance+Witkoff+Kushner). Lebanon dispute = #1 collapse risk.

timeline.title: D42 Apr 10 — Iran delegation arrives Pakistan
timeline.body: Ceasefire holding. Iran delegation arrives in Islamabad for scheduled talks. Trump warns of renewed/intensified strikes if no deal. Israel continues Lebanon operations — 300+ killed in Wednesday's strikes. Hormuz still blocked. Brent ~$96.

timeline.title: D43 Apr 11 — MARATHON TALKS + HORMUZ MINE-CLEARING
timeline.body: 21-hour marathon talks BEGIN in Islamabad with Vance + Witkoff + Kushner + Iran delegation. US Navy destroyers USS Peterson + USS Murphy attempt Hormuz mine-clearing transit. IRGC threatens ships, launches UAV. Disputed if transit succeeded. Trump claims clearing begun. Lebanon: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded.

timeline.title: D44 Apr 12 — TALKS FAILED, BLOCKADE HINTED
timeline.body: 21-hour Islamabad marathon ended with NO DEAL. Vance left: 'Iran chose not to accept our terms.' Key gaps: nuclear commitment, Hormuz control, enriched uranium, sanctions, reparations. Ghalibaf blames US 'trust' failure. Trump hints NAVAL BLOCKADE via Truth Social. Ceasefire technically holds through Apr 21 but collapse risk surging to 38%. Brent $95.20.

timeline.title: D45 Apr 13 — NAVAL BLOCKADE DECLARED
timeline.body: Trump declared naval blockade of all Iranian ports starting Monday 10AM ET. CENTCOM confirmed. Iran: 'piracy.' UK/France/Spain/Turkey refuse to join. China condemns. Brent surged to $102 (+8%). 3 tankers attempted exit. Ceasefire Day 7 but blockade = maritime war. 8 days to Apr 21 expiry.

timeline.title: D46 Apr 14 — BLOCKADE DAY 1 + DIPLOMACY STIRS
timeline.body: Blockade active since 10AM ET. NO confrontation — Iran did not resist. 4+ ships crossed (BBC Verify). Turkey FM Fidan: 45-60 DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION possible. Israel-Lebanon DIRECT TALKS at State Dept (first since 1993). Hezbollah opposes. Egypt FM to DC. Brent fell to $96.48. Multiple diplomatic channels opening for first time since collapse Apr 12. Convergence improving 4.6 (from 4.2).

timeline.title: D47 Apr 15 — TRUMP 'CLOSE TO OVER' + IRAN $270B + INTERNET CRACK
timeline.body: UPGRADED: Trump Fox Business 'I think it's close to over, yeah. Very close to over.' Iran spokeswoman Mohajerani: $270B war compensation demand — naming a price = pricing a deal. Iran starts business internet (April 14, Bloomberg) — first crack in 47-day blackout. Israel-Lebanon talks 'constructive,' next round in DC in weeks. CENTCOM: blockade 'fully implemented.' Brent $95.72, WTI $91.50 (-8%). Ceasefire Day 9 — 6 days to Apr 21. Convergence 5.0 (UP from 4.8). Deal 24% (UP). Collapse 36% (DOWN).

timeline.title: D48 Apr 16 — MUNIR IN TEHRAN + 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION + NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH PUSH
timeline.body: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arrives in Tehran with fresh US proposal — highest-level Pakistani mediation since war began. Pakistani mediators: 'optimistic about major breakthrough' on nuclear front. Nuclear gap now defined: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze. Iran's 440kg HEU on table. AP: US/Iran have 'in principle agreement' to extend ceasefire — senior US official: 'not formally agreed.' Trump Times of Israel: 'not thinking about extending' + 'amazing two days ahead.' White House: 'feels good about prospects of a deal.' Iran: 'several messages exchanged through Pakistan.' Iran petrochemicals suspended ($13B/yr, Apr 13 order). Blockade Day 3 no confrontation — Iran threatened counter-blockade Gulf/Red Sea/Oman. Brent $94.89, WTI $90.72. Ceasefire Day 10 — 5 days to Apr 21. Convergence 5.7. DEAL 31% = COLLAPSE 31% — tied for first time.

timeline.title: D49 Apr 17 — HORMUZ BRIEFLY OPENED + BRENT CRASHES $84
timeline.body: Iran FM Araghchi reopened Hormuz for commercial traffic (morning). Brent crashed ~11% to $84. Trump: 'Good meeting of the minds — good things happening.' Pakistan transmitted modified US proposal (15-yr enrichment freeze). Hormuz opening unverified by US/UAE but market believed it. Convergence jumped to 6.0 — highest ever. Zero attacks. Ceasefire D11.

timeline.title: D50 Apr 18 — HORMUZ RE-CLOSED + IRGC FIRES ON SANMAR HERALD
timeline.body: Iran reversed D49 opening within 24 hrs. IRGC gunboats fired warning shots at VLCC Sanmar Herald. CMA CGM Everglade turned back under IRGC escort. Iran FM: opening was 'goodwill gesture not reciprocated.' Brent rebounded to $90. 20+ ships diverted total. Convergence 4.8 (from 6.0 — sharpest single-day drop). Escalation 48%.

timeline.title: D51 Apr 19 — USS SPRUANCE SEIZES M/V TOUSKA — FIRST IRANIAN SHIP BOARDED
timeline.body: USS Spruance (DDG-111) boarded and seized Iranian cargo ship M/V Touska in Gulf of Oman (0340 local). Crew of 23 detained. Iran MFA: 'Act of piracy — will not go unanswered.' Iran VP Aref: Round 2 talks 'pointless.' Iran formally refuses Islamabad Round 2 (scheduled Apr 20-21). UAE detains Sarraf network individuals. 25 ships turned back total. Convergence 4.4. Escalation 52%.

timeline.body: CEASEFIRE DAY 14 — LAST DAY. Iran VP Aref: US conditions 'childish and impossible.' Iran absent from Islamabad Round 2. Trump: 'Maybe I won't extend it — have to start dropping bombs again.' Brent $95.42 (+5.58%). Hormuz closed D3. Touska crew detained. Internet Day 52 total / Day 7 business-partial. Lebanon 2,294+. HRANA 1,701+ civilians. Convergence 4.9. Escalation 52% — MOST DANGEROUS 24 HRS SINCE D1.

timeline_fa.body: اسرائیل ۱۰۰+ سایت در لبنان در ۱۰ دقیقه. ۲۵۴+ کشته. ایران اتهام نقض آتش‌بس. سپاه تهدید انسداد مجدد هرمز. مجلس: 'پاسخ محکم.' صفر حمله ایران روز ۴۱. مذاکرات شنبه ۱۲ آوریل (ونس+ویتکاف+کوشنر). برنت $۹۷.۳۹. لبنان = ریسک ۱ فروپاشی.

timeline_fa.body: ماراتن ۲۱ ساعته بدون نتیجه. ونس: 'ایران نپذیرفت.' شکاف: هسته‌ای، هرمز، اورانیوم، تحریم، غرامت. قالیباف: 'عدم اعتماد.' ترامپ محاصره دریایی. آتش‌بس تا ۲۱ آوریل اما ریسک ۳۸٪.

timeline_fa.body: ترامپ محاصره دریایی بنادر ایران از دوشنبه. سنتکام تأیید. ایران: 'دزدی دریایی.' بریتانیا/فرانسه/اسپانیا/ترکیه رد. چین محکوم. برنت ~$۱۰۲ (+۸٪). آتش‌بس روز ۷. ۸ روز تا ۲۱ آوریل.

timeline_fa.body: ترامپ Fox Business: 'نزدیک به پایان است. خیلی نزدیک.' ایران $۲۷۰B خسارت — قیمت‌گذاری توافق. اینترنت کسب‌وکارها شروع (۱۴ آوریل). لبنان-اسرائیل 'سازنده.' برنت $۹۵.۷۲، WTI $۹۱.۵ (-۸٪). آتش‌بس روز ۹ — ۶ روز. همگرایی ۵.۰ (↑). توافق ۲۴٪ (↑). فروپاشی ۳۶٪ (↓).

AP: توافق اصولی تمدید. ترامپ: 'دو روز شگفت‌انگیز.' کاخ سفید خوشبین. پتروشیمی متوقف. محاصره روز ۳ بدون رویارویی. تهدید ضدمحاصره. برنت $۹۴.۸۹. آتش‌بس روز ۱۰ — ۵ روز. همگرایی ۵.۷. توافق ۳۱٪ = فروپاشی ۳۱٪ — اولین بار مساوی.

timeline_fa.title: D49 ۱۷ آوریل — هرمز باز شد + برنت سقوط $۸۴
timeline_fa.body: وزیر خارجه عراقچی هرمز را برای ترافیک تجاری باز اعلام کرد (صبح). برنت ~۱۱٪ سقوط به $۸۴. ترامپ: 'همفکری خوب — اتفاقات خوب.' پاکستان پیشنهاد آمریکا (توقف ۱۵ ساله غنی‌سازی) منتقل کرد. صفر حمله. آتش‌بس روز ۱۱. همگرایی ۶.۰ — بالاترین تاریخ.

timeline_fa.title: D50 ۱۸ آوریل — هرمز دوباره بسته + سپاه به سنمار هرالد شلیک کرد
timeline_fa.body: ایران ظرف ۲۴ ساعت بازگشایی D49 را معکوس کرد. قایق‌های سپاه به نفتکش VLCC سنمار هرالد شلیک هشداری کردند. CMA CGM اورگلاد تحت اسکورت سپاه برگشت. برنت به $۹۰ بازگشت (+۷.۱٪). ۲۰+ کشتی برگشته. همگرایی ۴.۸ (از ۶.۰ — تیزترین سقوط). تشدید ۴۸٪.

timeline_fa.title: D51 ۱۹ آوریل — USS اسپروانس توسکا را توقیف کرد — اولین کشتی ایرانی توقیف شد
timeline_fa.body: USS Spruance (DDG-111) کشتی باری ایرانی M/V Touska را در خلیج عمان توقیف کرد (۳:۴۰ بامداد محلی). خدمه ۲۳ نفر بازداشت. ایران وزارت امور خارجه: 'دزدی دریایی.' معاون رئیس‌جمهور عارف: مذاکرات دور دوم 'بی‌فایده.' ایران رسماً به اسلام‌آباد نمی‌رود. امارات شبکه صراف را بازداشت. ۲۵ کشتی برگشته. همگرایی ۴.۴. تشدید ۵۲٪.

timeline_fa.title: D52 ۲۰ آوریل — آتش‌بس فردا منقضی — خطرناک‌ترین ۲۴ ساعت از روز اول
timeline_fa.body: آتش‌بس روز ۱۴ — آخرین روز. عارف: 'کودکانه و غیرممکن.' ایران در اسلام‌آباد غایب. ترامپ: 'شاید تمدید نکنم — باید دوباره بمب بیندازیم.' برنت $۹۵.۴۲ (+۵.۵۸٪). هرمز بسته روز ۳. توسکا بازداشت. اینترنت روز ۵۲ کل / روز ۷ کسب‌وکار جزئی. لبنان ۲٬۲۹۴+. هرانا ۱٬۷۰۱+ غیرنظامی. همگرایی ۴.۹. تشدید ۵۲٪.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Ceasefire collapses / Escalation
scenarioProbabilities.detail: UP from 31%. Ceasefire expires tomorrow Apr 21. Iran VP Aref: US demands 'childish and impossible.' Iran refuses Round 2 talks. USS Spruance seized M/V Touska (first boarding). IRGC fired on VLCC Sanmar Herald. Trump: 'Maybe I won't extend it — have to start dropping bombs again.' Hormuz re-closed D3. 25 ships turned back. All indicators pointing toward resumption D53.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Stalled / Protracted standoff
scenarioProbabilities.detail: Both sides allow ceasefire to lapse with tacit agreement not to escalate immediately — buying time without formal extension. Possible if neither side wants the PR hit of 'breaking' the ceasefire but deal is not ready. Turkey 45-60 day extension offer still technically on table.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.detail: DOWN from 31%. Deal now requires ceasefire extension AND Round 2 agreement — Iran has rejected both. Hormuz re-closure + Touska seizure have poisoned the well. 15-yr enrichment compromise still theoretically available but no channel to deliver it. Requires dramatic reversal in next 24 hours.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Declared victory / Withdrawal
scenarioProbabilities.detail: Trump declares 'mission accomplished' — military objectives achieved, ceasefire as de facto end — and withdraws without formal deal. Iran keeps enrichment program but degraded. Could happen if resuming strikes looks too costly. Unchanged.

scenarioProbabilities.label: International intervention
scenarioProbabilities.detail: DOWN from 5%. Pakistan mediation channel collapsed (Iran no-showed). UN Security Council emergency session possible but China/Russia would block binding resolution. Multilateral framework requires weeks Iran doesn't want to give.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Regime fracture
scenarioProbabilities.detail: No evidence of internal fracture. IRGC united behind hardline position. Aref's 'childish' statement reflects regime consensus. Unchanged at 1%.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: فروپاشی آتش‌بس / تشدید
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: افزایش از ۳۱٪. آتش‌بس فردا منقضی. عارف: 'کودکانه.' ایران دور دوم نه. توقیف توسکا. شلیک به سنمار. ترامپ: 'شاید تمدید نکنم.' هرمز بسته روز ۳. ۲۵ کشتی برگشته. همه نشانگرها به سمت از سرگیری D53.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: بن‌بست / تقابل طولانی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: هر دو طرف اجازه می‌دهند آتش‌بس بدون تمدید رسمی منقضی شود اما فوری تشدید نمی‌کنند. ترکیه ۴۵-۶۰ روز تمدید هنوز روی میز.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: توافق مذاکره‌ای
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: کاهش از ۳۱٪. ایران هم تمدید و هم دور دوم را رد کرد. توسکا + هرمز محیط را مسموم کرد. نیاز به تغییر دراماتیک در ۲۴ ساعت آینده.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: اعلام پیروزی / خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: ترامپ 'ماموریت انجام شد' — بدون توافق رسمی. احتمال اگر از سرگیری حملات خیلی پرهزینه باشد.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: کاهش از ۵٪. کانال پاکستان شکست خورد. چین/روسیه قطعنامه سازمان ملل را وتو می‌کنند.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: شکاف رژیم
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: بدون شواهد شکاف داخلی. سپاه متحد. ۱٪ بدون تغییر.

theoryEvaluation.title: TOUSKA SEIZURE + SANMAR HERALD FIRING = IRAN'S ESCALATION LADDER BEING CLIMBED
theoryEvaluation.body: Two naval incidents in 48 hours (D50-D51) represent Iran systematically escalating asymmetric naval pressure while formally maintaining the ceasefire. This is textbook Iranian strategic behavior: create facts on the ground (Sanmar Herald firing D50, Touska seizure by US D51) that make the other side's position more costly, just before a deadline (ceasefire expiry Apr 21). Iran didn't start these; the US did by seizing Touska. But Iran had already fired on Sanmar Herald first. The sequence: Iran tests (Sanmar) → US escalates (Touska) → Iran threatens retaliation → ceasefire expires. This is the classic path to resumption.

theoryEvaluation.title: AREF TRUMP 'CHILDISH' REJECTION = HARDLINE FACTION VICTORY WITHIN IRAN
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran VP Aref's 'childish and impossible' language about US conditions is notable for its harshness. This is not diplomatic language — it's a domestic political signal. Aref, aligned with IRGC hardliners, is using the public rejection of Round 2 to foreclose the reformist track (Araghchi's Hormuz opening D49). The 24-hour Hormuz opening (D49) followed by re-closure (D50) tells the same story: the reformist faction tried de-escalation, the hardline faction overruled. IRGC is running Iran's war policy at this critical juncture.

theoryEvaluation.title: CONVERGENCE 4.9 — THE WHIPSAW FROM 6.0 BACK TO 4.9 TELLS THE WHOLE STORY
theoryEvaluation.body: Convergence peaked at 6.0 on D49 — the highest point since ceasefire began — on the Hormuz opening and 15-yr enrichment compromise signal. Within 72 hours: Hormuz re-closed, IRGC fired on tanker, US seized Touska, Iran refused Round 2, ceasefire now expires tomorrow. The whipsaw from 6.0 to 4.4 to 4.9 is exactly what structural negotiations failure looks like: a moment of genuine possibility (D49) followed by a structural inability to convert it into a deal. The 15-yr compromise that caused Brent to crash to $84 had no mechanism to convert Iran's interest into action before IRGC hardliners re-closed Hormuz.

theoryEvaluation.title: THE 52% ESCALATION SCENARIO: WHAT HAPPENS IF CEASEFIRE LAPSES TOMORROW
theoryEvaluation.body: If ceasefire expires Apr 21 without extension or deal: Iran will likely resume missile/drone campaign within hours, not days. Reasons: (1) IRGC has had 13 days to resupply and reposition; (2) Touska seizure provides casus belli; (3) Aref's public 'childish' statement forecloses retreat without Iranian face-saving; (4) Trump's 'dropping bombs' language signals US willingness to resume. What changes from D1: IRGC now knows exactly which targets are most sensitive, coalition interceptor stocks are partially depleted from D1-D39, and Hormuz is already closed so initial economic shock is compressed. Brent would spike to $110-120+ on first D53 launch.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: توقیف توسکا + شلیک به سنمار = نردبان تشدید ایران
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: دو حادثه دریایی در ۴۸ ساعت = ایران سیستماتیک فشار ناهمتراز دریایی را تشدید می‌کند. سنمار (D50 ایران): تست. توسکا (D51 آمریکا): جواب. ایران تهدید تلافی. آتش‌بس فردا منقضی. مسیر کلاسیک از سرگیری.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: رد 'کودکانه' عارف = پیروزی جناح سخت‌لاین در ایران
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: زبان 'کودکانه و غیرممکن' یک سیگنال سیاسی داخلی است. عارف جناح سپاه است. بازگشایی هرمز D49 توسط عراقچی (اصلاح‌طلب) و بسته شدن D50 توسط سپاه = همان داستان. سپاه سیاست جنگ ایران را در این لحظه بحرانی هدایت می‌کند.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: همگرایی ۶.۰→۴.۹ — تمام داستان در این نوسان
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: اوج ۶.۰ در D49: بازگشایی هرمز + پیشنهاد ۱۵ ساله. ظرف ۷۲ ساعت: هرمز بسته، شلیک به سنمار، توقیف توسکا، رد دور دوم. این دقیقاً شکست مذاکرات ساختاری است: لحظه امکان واقعی (D49) + ناتوانی ساختاری برای تبدیل آن به توافق.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سناریوی ۵۲٪ تشدید: اگر آتش‌بس فردا لغو شود چه می‌شود
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: اگر ۲۱ آوریل بدون تمدید/توافق: ایران احتمالاً ظرف ساعات از سر می‌گیرد. دلایل: ۱۳ روز آمادگی سپاه؛ توسکا = بهانه؛ عارف 'کودکانه' = عقب‌نشینی بدون آبرو ناممکن؛ ترامپ 'بمب بیندازیم'. برنت به $۱۱۰-۱۲۰+ خواهد جهید.

endstate.title: Most likely — ESCALATION/COLLAPSE 52%
endstate.body: CEASEFIRE EXPIRES TOMORROW APR 21. Escalation/collapse surged from 31% → 52% in 4 days — driven by Hormuz re-closing (D50), IRGC firing on Sanmar Herald (D50), USS Spruance seizing M/V Touska (D51, first Iranian ship boarded), Iran VP Aref calling US demands 'childish' (D51), and Trump 'maybe won't extend' (D52). Diplomatic momentum vector collapsed from 7.5 (D49) to 2.5 (D52). Convergence whipsawed from 6.0 peak back to 4.9. If ceasefire lapses without extension tomorrow: expect IRGC missile salvos within 24-48 hrs.

endstate.title: Deal 18% — COLLAPSED FROM 31%
endstate.body: Negotiated deal. DOWN sharply from 31% to 18%. Drivers of collapse: Iran VP Aref 'childish' rejection of Round 2, no mediator meeting scheduled, Trump threatening no extension. For deal to happen: backchannel must re-open tonight or early tomorrow, OR Trump announces unilateral extension without Iran's agreement (possible but politically costly). Key obstacle: Touska seizure = new Iranian demand for vessel release before talks resume.

endstate.title: Third — STALLED 15%
endstate.body: Stalled/frozen conflict. DOWN from 22%. With ceasefire expiring tomorrow and both sides publicly refusing further talks, a stall requires MUTUAL de-facto inaction despite no formal extension — possible but unlikely given IRGC threat messaging and Trump political pressures. Stall scenario = both sides blink but neither announces it.

endstate.title: Fourth (10%/4%/1%)
endstate.body: Victory 10% (unchanged — Trump 'mission accomplished' framing still available; Brent $95 = political pain but stockpile depletion narrative intact). International intervention 4% (UP from 1% — Turkey 45-60 day extension offer still on table; EU emergency session possible if ceasefire collapses). Regime fracture 1% (unchanged — IRGC consolidated, no fracture signals).

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین — تشدید/فروپاشی ۵۲٪
endstate_fa.body: آتش‌بس فردا ۲۱ آوریل منقضی می‌شود. تشدید/فروپاشی از ۳۱٪ به ۵۲٪ جهش کرد — به دلیل: بسته شدن مجدد هرمز (روز ۵۰)، شلیک سپاه به نفتکش سانمار هرالد، توقیف کشتی توسکا توسط ناوشکن آمریکایی (اول کشتی ایرانی توقیف شد)، رد 'کودکانه' خواسته‌های آمریکا توسط آرف، و گفته ترامپ 'شاید تمدید نکنم.' اگر آتش‌بس فردا منقضی شود: موشک‌باران سپاه ظرف ۲۴-۴۸ ساعت.

endstate_fa.title: توافق ۱۸٪ — سقوط از ۳۱٪
endstate_fa.body: توافق مذاکره‌ای. کاهش شدید از ۳۱٪ به ۱۸٪. دلایل سقوط: رد دور دوم توسط آرف، عدم برنامه‌ریزی برای جلسه میانجی، تهدید ترامپ به عدم تمدید. برای توافق: باید کانال پشتی امشب یا فردا صبح دوباره باز شود، یا ترامپ به تنهایی تمدید اعلام کند.

endstate_fa.title: بن‌بست ۱۵٪
endstate_fa.body: کاهش از ۲۲٪. با انقضای آتش‌بس فردا و رد مذاکرات توسط هر دو طرف، بن‌بست نیازمند عدم عمل ضمنی دو جانبه است — ممکن اما بعید، با توجه به تهدیدات سپاه و فشار سیاسی ترامپ.

endstate_fa.title: پیروزی ۱۰٪ / مداخله ۴٪ / شکاف ۱٪
endstate_fa.body: پیروزی ۱۰٪: روایت 'ماموریت انجام شد' ترامپ هنوز در دسترس است. مداخله بین‌المللی ۴٪: پیشنهاد تمدید ۴۵-۶۰ روزه ترکیه هنوز روی میز. نشست اضطراری اتحادیه اروپا در صورت فروپاشی آتش‌بس ممکن است. شکاف ۱٪: سپاه تثبیت شده، نشانه‌ای از شکاف نیست.

Turkey: Extension offer still technically on table but sidelined by Iran's Round 2 refusal. If ceasefire lapses without extension Apr 21, Turkey's offer becomes irrelevant unless both sides want a D55-D60 resumption pause.

IRGC: 13 days of ceasefire = maintenance window used productively. Pre-positioned for D53 if order comes. Naval units (Sanmar Herald, Touska response) already in confrontation mode. The real decision-maker in Iran on whether to resume.

USS اسپروانس: توسکا را توقیف کرد (D51). اولین توقیف فیزیکی. بهانه تلافی ایران اگر D53 از سر گرفته شود.
امارات/دوبی: بازداشت شبکه صراف (۱۹ آوریل) = انتخاب همراستایی مالی با آمریکا. بی‌سابقه در این جنگ. دروازه مالی ایران-دوبی محدود شد.
ترکیه: پیشنهاد تمدید هنوز روی میز اما کنار گذاشته شده. اگر آتش‌بس D53 بدون تمدید منقضی شود = پیشنهاد ترکیه نامربوط.
سپاه پاسداران: ۱۳ روز نگهداری = آمادگی. قایق‌های سپاه به سنمار هرالد شلیک کردند. از نظر عملیاتی آماده از سرگیری.

exponentialDecay.label: Depletion Model
exponentialDecay.description: Assumes stockpiles structurally depleted — exponential decay continues to zero
exponentialDecay.description_fa: فرض بر اتمام ساختاری ذخایر — کاهش نمایی تا صفر ادامه دارد
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome: Iran ceases offensive operations by mid-April. War ends via military exhaustion + negotiated exit. Coalition declares victory.
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران عملیات تهاجمی را تا اواسط آوریل متوقف می‌کند. جنگ با فرسایش نظامی + خروج مذاکره‌ای پایان می‌یابد.
exponentialDecay.falsifiedBy: D38-D39 at 41-58/day. Ceasefire D40 = political stand-down, not exhaustion. Definitively falsified.

plateauRationing.label: Rationing Model
plateauRationing.description: Assumes plateau at ~30/day = strategic rationing from deeper stockpiles (IRGC D16 claim)
plateauRationing.description_fa: فرض بر جیره‌بندی استراتژیک از ذخایر عمیق‌تر (ادعای سپاه D16)
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome: Iran maintained ~45-58/day through D39, then stood down by political decision in ceasefire. Validates strategic rationing thesis — capability preserved for diplomatic leverage.
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران آزار ۲+ ماه. هاآرتص: نیمی پرتاب‌کننده‌ها سالم. جنگ با مذاکره یا تشدید.
plateauRationing.falsifiedBy: None. D40 ceasefire = political pause, stockpile thesis intact.

vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion: D52 6.5 (unchanged D41-D52). 13 straight days zero launches. Ceasefire pause = IRGC maintenance and repositioning window. Zero launches = stockpiles intact. Touska seizure and Sanmar Herald firing = naval asymmetric, not missile/drone. Iran capability preserved for post-ceasefire resumption if D53 no extension.
vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion_fa: روز ۵۲: ۶.۵ (ثابت D41-D52). ۱۳ روز صفر پرتاب. آتش‌بس = پنجره نگهداری سپاه. توقیف توسکا و شلیک به سنمار = دریایی، نه موشکی. توان حفظ شده برای از سرگیری احتمالی D53.
vectorNotes.economicPain: D52 8.5 (UP sharply). Brent $95.42 (+5.58%). WTI $91. D49: Brent crashed to $84 (Hormuz opening). D50: rebounded to $90 (Hormuz re-closure + Sanmar Herald). D52: $95.42 on Touska + ceasefire expiry fears. Iran petrochemicals still suspended ($54M/day). Hormuz closed D3. 25 vessels diverted. Cape rerouting adding $3-5M/ship. Market now pricing 52% escalation — oil trending toward $115-125 if ceasefire lapses.
vectorNotes.economicPain_fa: روز ۵۲: ۸.۵ (↑ تیز). برنت $۹۵.۴۲ (+۵.۵۸٪). هفته پرنوسان: $۸۴ → $۹۰ → $۹۵.۴۲. پتروشیمی هنوز متوقف. هرمز بسته روز ۳. ۲۵ کشتی برگشته. بازار ۵۲٪ تشدید = $۱۱۵-۱۲۵ اگر آتش‌بس منقضی.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum: D52 2.5 (COLLAPSED from 7.5 D48 peak). D49: 7.5 on Hormuz opening + 15-yr proposal. D50: 2.5 — Hormuz re-closed, Iran walked back. D51: 1.5 — Touska seized, Iran refuses Round 2. D52: 2.5 — slight stabilization but channel effectively dead. Iran VP Aref: US conditions 'childish and impossible.' Iran absent from Islamabad. Pakistan channel broken. No active proposal on table. Lowest diplomatic score since D1-D5.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum_fa: روز ۵۲: ۲.۵ (فروپاشی از اوج ۷.۵ D48). D49: ۷.۵ (هرمز باز). D50: ۲.۵ (هرمز بسته). D51: ۱.۵ (توسکا + رد دور دوم). D52: ۲.۵. عارف: 'کودکانه.' ایران در اسلام‌آباد غایب. پایین‌ترین از D1-D5.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability: D52 4.0 (UP from 3.5). Ceasefire expiry TOMORROW creates political forcing function. Trump 'dropping bombs again' = playing to base, not dovish. Gas prices rising ($91 WTI). No US KIA under ceasefire = still positive. War fatigue elevated but Trump 'mission accomplished' framing still available. Slight uptick: Trump's rhetoric matches base sentiment — if he resumes strikes, political cost lower than expected.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability_fa: روز ۵۲: ۴.۰ (↑ از ۳.۵). انقضای آتش‌بس فردا = نقطه اجبار سیاسی. ترامپ 'بمب بیندازیم' = پایگاه رأی. WTI $۹۱ = قیمت بنزین بالا. بدون کشته آمریکایی زیر آتش‌بس. خستگی جنگ ولی چارچوب 'ماموریت انجام' هنوز ممکن.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance: D52 2.0 (near ceiling). Ceasefire expires TOMORROW — closest to ceiling since D39. Touska seizure (first Iranian ship boarded) = Iran will respond. Hormuz closed D3. IRGC fired on Sanmar Herald. Iran counter-threat on Gulf/Red Sea/Oman = now closer to action. If ceasefire lapses D53: escalation ceiling hit within 24-48 hrs. Nearest ceiling: Iranian missile resume + potentially Bab al-Mandab Houthi reopening.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance_fa: روز ۵۲: ۲.۰ (نزدیک سقف). آتش‌بس فردا منقضی — نزدیک‌ترین به سقف از D39. توقیف توسکا = ایران تلافی می‌کند. هرمز بسته روز ۳. شلیک به سنمار. اگر آتش‌بس لغو D53: سقف ظرف ۲۴-۴۸ ساعت.

warOutcome.prediction: D52 (Apr 20): CEASEFIRE EXPIRES TOMORROW — ESCALATION NOW MOST LIKELY OUTCOME. Iran VP Aref has formally rejected Round 2. USS Spruance seized M/V Touska — Iran will retaliate. IRGC fired on VLCC Sanmar Herald. Hormuz closed Day 3. Trump: 'Maybe I won't extend it — have to start dropping bombs again.' Convergence 4.9 (collapsed from 6.0 D49 peak). Most likely scenario: ceasefire lapses Apr 21, Iran resumes missile/drone campaign D53. Escalation 52%. Deal 18%. Stalled 15%. Victory 10%. Intervention 4%. Fracture 1%.
warOutcome.prediction_fa: روز ۵۲ (۲۰ آوریل): آتش‌بس فردا منقضی — تشدید محتمل‌ترین پیامد. عارف: دور دوم رد. توقیف توسکا = ایران تلافی. شلیک به سنمار. هرمز بسته روز ۳. ترامپ: 'شاید تمدید نکنم.' همگرایی ۴.۹. تشدید ۵۲٪. توافق ۱۸٪. بن‌بست ۱۵٪. پیروزی ۱۰٪.
warOutcome.derivation: Military exhaustion 6.5 (unchanged — 13 straight days zero attacks; ceasefire = IRGC repositioning window; stockpiles intact; naval action not missile/drone). Economic pain 8.5 (UP — Brent $95.42 +5.58%; weekly volatility $84→$90→$95.42; Hormuz closed D3; 25 ships diverted; Iran petrochemicals still suspended $54M/day; Cape rerouting $3-5M/ship premium; market now pricing 52% escalation). Diplomatic momentum 2.5 (COLLAPSED — D49 peak 7.5 on Hormuz opening; D50 crash to 2.5 on re-closure; D51 1.5 on Touska+Round2 refusal; D52 2.5 stabilization but no channel active; Pakistan broken; Iran VP Aref 'childish'). US political sustainability 4.0 (UP from 3.5 — Trump's 'dropping bombs' rhetoric matches base; ceasefire death is politically acceptable for Trump; gas rising but war fatigue managed). Escalation ceiling distance 2.0 (near breach — ceasefire expires tomorrow; Touska = casus belli; Hormuz closure + Sanmar firing; IRGC pre-positioning; nearest ceiling: D53 missile resumption).
warOutcome.derivation_fa: Military(6.5 ثابت). Economic(8.5 ↑↑ — برنت $۹۵.۴۲؛ هرمز بسته؛ ۲۵ کشتی). Diplomatic(2.5 ↓↓ — فروپاشی از ۷.۵؛ توسکا؛ رد دور دوم؛ عارف 'کودکانه'). Political(4.0 ↑). Escalation(2.0 — نزدیک سقف؛ فردا منقضی).
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation: Convergence 4.9/10 — DOWN from 6.0 D49 peak. D48: 5.7 → D49: 6.0 → D50: 4.8 → D51: 4.4 → D52: 4.9 (slight recovery but below D48). Weighted: Military(6.5×0.25=1.625) + Economic(8.5×0.20=1.70) + Diplomatic(2.5×0.20=0.50) + Political(4.0×0.20=0.80) + Escalation(2.0×0.15=0.30) = 4.925 → 4.9. Key driver of collapse: diplomatic momentum crashed from 7.5 (D49 Hormuz opening) to 2.5 (Touska + Round 2 refusal). If ceasefire lapses D53 and Iran resumes: convergence drops to 2.0-3.0. If last-minute extension: jumps to 6.0+. Everything pivots on next 24 hours before Apr 21 0001.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation_fa: همگرایی ۴.۹ از ۱۰ — کاهش از اوج ۶.۰ D49. D48: ۵.۷ → D49: ۶.۰ → D50: ۴.۸ → D51: ۴.۴ → D52: ۴.۹ (کمی بهبود اما زیر D48). محاسبه: Military(1.625) + Economic(1.70) + Diplomatic(0.50) + Political(0.80) + Escalation(0.30) = ۴.۹۲۵. محرک فروپاشی: دیپلماسی از ۷.۵ به ۲.۵ (هرمز → توسکا → رد دور دوم). اگر از سرگیری D53: ۲.۰-۳.۰. اگر تمدید: ۶.۰+.

supplyChainTimeline.estimate: Deal + 1-2 weeks (if deal) OR FY28 (if escalation)
supplyChainTimeline.detail: D52 update: Deal 18% — much lower than D48's 31%. Ceasefire expires TOMORROW. Business internet partial Day 7 = partial coordination possible NOW. If D53 strikes resume: warehouse potentially in danger zone again. Use business internet window today to verify warehouse status before potential blackout.
82,000+ structures damaged. Warehouse status unknown. Need physical inspection + digital inventory reconciliation.
700km overland through Tabriz-Agarak. Border congestion likely. Customs uncertain. 3x normal cost. 14-21 day transit.
Full chain: Tehran warehouse → overland → Armenia/Turkey → air freight → Atlanta → UPS. Every link currently broken.
Requires: Hormuz open, Dubai air cargo resumed, banking normalized, publishing industry recovered. Each is months away.

هرمز + دبی + بانک + نشر. هرکدام ماه‌ها.

مسیر اصلی قبل جنگ. آخرین مسیر بازگشت.

tehranCommsStatus.lastConfirmedContact: Feb 28 (D1) — business internet partial since Apr 14

D52 WARNING: Ceasefire expires TOMORROW — if D53 strikes resume, business internet will almost certainly be revoked. Use business internet window TODAY to contact Tehran. If deal: civilian internet could restore within 48-72 hrs. If escalation: full blackout continues indefinitely.
tehranCommsStatus.detail_fa: ۱٬۲۴۸+ ساعت. ۵۲ روز. $۲.۶B+. رکورد جدید. اینترنت کسب‌وکار جزئی روز ۷. هشدار: آتش‌بس فردا منقضی — اگر D53: قطع کامل. از پنجره امروز استفاده کنید.

inventoryRunway.detail: ~1.9 months remaining. Deal probability DOWN to 18% (from 31% D48). Ceasefire expires TOMORROW. If D53 escalation: critical by mid-June, possibly June 1. Act THIS WEEK: confirm Armenia overland logistics regardless of ceasefire outcome — this is the only supply path that survives escalation. Begin FY27 bridge financing conversations.
inventoryRunway.detail_fa: ~۱.۹ ماه باقی. توافق ۱۸٪ (از ۳۱٪ D48). آتش‌بس فردا منقضی. اگر D53: بحران اواخر مه-اواسط ژوئن. این هفته: ارمنستان تأیید کنید. مذاکرات تأمین مالی پل FY27.
inventoryRunway.criticalDate: June 1-15, 2026. Deal → extends to Aug+. D53 escalation → accelerates to Jun 1.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: کاغذ و مرکب: ایران ۷۰٪+ کاغذ چاپ وارد می‌کند. هرمز + تحریم = زنجیره قطع. کارخانه‌ها ۲۰-۳۰٪ ظرفیت.
ظرفیت چاپ: چاپخانه‌های تهران متناوب. قطع اینترنت ۷۶۸+ ساعت = پیش‌چاپ دیجیتال ناممکن. ۸۰-۹۰٪ کاهش.
توزیع: شبکه (شهر کتاب و غیره) مختل. ۸۲,۰۰۰+ ساختمان آسیب. فروشگاه‌ها بسته. سفارش آنلاین ناممکن.
سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.
جایگزین دیجیتال: طاقچه، فیدیبو غیرفعال. پس بازگشت اینترنت سریع‌تر. اما دانشگاه‌ها نسخه فیزیکی نیاز دارند.

dubaiBankingRisk.detail: D52: 8.5/10. UP from 7.5. UAE authorities detained Sarraf network individuals (Apr 19) — formal law enforcement action against Iran-linked informal banking in Dubai. This is unprecedented for UAE in this conflict. Gulf banks no longer cautiously monitoring Iran-linked transactions — they are actively restricting. Brent $95.42 (+5.58%) = market panic. Ceasefire expires tomorrow. If D53 strikes resume: score spikes to 9.5+.
dubaiBankingRisk.detail_fa: D52: ۸.۵/۱۰. افزایش از ۷.۵. امارات صراف‌های ایران‌محور را بازداشت (۱۹ آوریل) — اقدام مستقیم قانونی. بانک‌های خلیج دیگر فقط نظارت نمی‌کنند — فعالانه محدود می‌کنند. اگر D53: ۹.۵+.
dubaiBankingRisk.action: D52 EMERGENCY ACTION: Do NOT attempt ANY Iran-linked Dubai banking transactions. UAE Sarraf crackdown means informal channels are under active law enforcement — using them risks detention of KIP principals. Execute ALL transactions through Tbilisi or KL until further notice.

alternativeHubs.notes: Strong logistics infrastructure. Turkish banks cautious on Iran-linked trade but not frozen. Erdogan mediator role creates political cover. Risk: Turkey's NATO membership creates compliance friction. Currency volatility (TRY).
Oman traditionally neutral. Banking corridor to Iran still partially open. BUT port targeted by 2 UAVs D29 — risk profile changing. Proximity to conflict zone.
Safe from conflict. Growing Iranian diaspora + business presence. Limited logistics infrastructure. Small banking sector. Good for cash preservation, poor for trade operations.

Furthest from conflict. CIMB + Maybank process Iran-adjacent trade. Free zones available. Challenge: time zone, distance from customers, unfamiliar regulatory environment. BEST for risk-averse repositioning.

alternativeHubs_fa.notes: لجستیک قوی. بانک‌ها محتاط. اردوغان میانجی. ریسک: ناتو + نوسان لیر.
عمان خنثی. بانک باز. اما بندر هدف D29. نزدیک منطقه درگیری.
امن. لجستیک محدود. بانک کوچک. برای حفظ نقدینگی.
دورترین. CIMB + Maybank. منطقه آزاد. بهترین برای ریسک‌گریزی.

hormuzReopeningTimeline.detail: REVERSED: Hormuz re-closed D50 after 24-hr opening D49. IRGC fired on Sanmar Herald. M/V Touska seized. 25+ ships turned back. Pre-deal safe passage is now impossible — requires de-escalation first.
Maham 3/7 mines confirmed. Clearance requires specialized MCM vessels. US + UK + France MCM assets in region but not deployed to clear yet.
Lloyd's JWC listed entire Persian Gulf. War risk premium 3.8% of hull value (from 0.02% pre-war). Won't normalize until mines cleared + 90 days incident-free.
Requires: mines cleared, insurance normalized, port infrastructure repaired, Bab al-Mandab safe (Houthi factor). 1,000+ stranded tankers to process.

hormuzReopeningTimeline_fa.detail: فعلاً ~۵-۱۰ با عوارض یوآنی. نیاز: چارچوب چندجانبه + اسکورت.
مهام ۳/۷ تأیید. نیاز به ناوهای MCM تخصصی.
لویدز کل خلیج. حق‌بیمه ۳.۸٪ (از ۰.۰۲٪). نیاز: مین‌روبی + ۹۰ روز بدون حادثه.
مین + بیمه + بندر + باب‌المندب. ۱,۰۰۰+ نفتکش معطل.

strandedCargo.location: Jebel Ali Free Zone + Hamriyah Free Zone
strandedCargo.detail: Most cargo insured under pre-war marine policies. Claims processing delayed — Lloyd's overwhelmed. Perishables (~15% by value) written off. Non-perishable goods safe in bonded storage but incurring daily storage fees (~$150/container/day).
strandedCargo.detail_fa: اکثر بار بیمه. پردازش خسارت تأخیر. فاسدشدنی (~۱۵٪) از دست رفته. غیرفاسدشدنی در انبار اما هزینه روزانه (~$۱۵۰/کانتینر/روز).

insuranceCostIndex.note: D38: Crowne Plaza Bahrain drone + USN Fifth Fleet missile. IRGC 'new order' = permanent Gulf posture. Hull 13.5% = UNINSURABLE. War risk 5.3%.

cumulativeByCountry._note: Estimated cumul ~3,361 missiles / ~5,298 drones through D38. D38: Khademi killed, coordinated barrage, UAE MoD cumul: 519/26/2,210.

estimatedStockpiles.note: Based on IISS/CSIS pre-war estimates minus confirmed expenditure (~3,185 fired). Assumes no resupply.
Based on IRGC D16 claim 'most weapons cache intact, using decade-old missiles.' If true, Iran has 4-9 months of sustained fire.
Midpoint. Accounts for some resupply from North Korea/China pipeline + hidden stockpiles minus battle damage.

oilScenarioBands.note: Projections based on Goldman Sachs ($110 avg), Citi ($120+ if sustained), IEA worst-case. Ceasefire scenario assumes phased Hormuz reopening. Bab al-Mandab closure = both chokepoints blocked.
oilScenarioBands.note_fa: پیش‌بینی‌ها بر اساس گلدمن ساکس ($110)، سیتی ($120+)، IEA بدترین حالت. آتش‌بس = بازگشایی مرحله‌ای هرمز. بستن باب‌المندب = هر دو تنگه.

hormuzTransit.note: D52 (Apr 20): Hormuz CLOSED — ~2 vessels/day (IRGC escort/interception). D49 (Apr 17): brief opening, ~15 vessels, then D50 (Apr 18) IRGC fired on Sanmar Herald, Hormuz re-closed. D51 (Apr 19): USS Spruance seized M/V Touska. 25+ total vessels turned back. Iran vowed retaliation. Cape of Good Hope routing: +$3-5M/ship. Pre-war average 62/day.
hormuzTransit.note_fa: روز ۵۲ (۲۰ آوریل): هرمز بسته — ~۲ کشتی/روز (اسکورت/توقیف سپاه). D49: بازگشایی موقت ۱۵ کشتی. D50: سپاه به سنمار شلیک، هرمز بسته. D51: توسکا توقیف. ۲۵+ کشتی برگشته. تلافی ایران.

ceasefireDeadline.label: April 21 ceasefire expiry
ceasefireDeadline.context: Trump-Iran 2-week ceasefire announced Apr 7 (Pakistan-brokered). Islamabad Round 2 CANCELLED — Iran VP Aref: 'US conditions childish.' BLOCKADE ACTIVE since Apr 14. decapitationTracker.name: Ali Larijani
decapitationTracker.replacement: No direct replacement. Diplomatic channel lost.
decapitationTracker.significance: Key back-channel figure. Death narrowed diplomatic options.

decapitationTracker.name: Soleimani (nephew)
decapitationTracker.significance: Symbolic — Soleimani name carries weight in IRGC.

decapitationTracker.name: Adm. Tangsiri
decapitationTracker.replacement: No confirmed successor. Safe passage expanding despite death = institutional not personal.
decapitationTracker.significance: Most significant naval decapitation. Designed the Hormuz blockade strategy.

decapitationTracker.name: ~40 senior officials
decapitationTracker.replacement: IRGC promoting from within. Command continuity maintained at institutional level.
decapitationTracker.significance: Cumulative loss. CENTCOM: 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed.

decapitationTracker.name: Kamal Kharazi
decapitationTracker.replacement: Wife killed. Back-channel to Pakistan disrupted. Diplomatic momentum damaged.
decapitationTracker.significance: Was overseeing the China-Pakistan peace plan channel. His wounding may derail the most promising diplomatic track.

decapitationTracker.name: Makram Atimi
decapitationTracker.replacement: Unknown. Several battalion commanders also killed. Central ballistic missile unit decapitated.
decapitationTracker.significance: Significant loss of missile command expertise. IDF confirmed kill in Kermanshah area along with battalion commanders.

decapitationTracker.name: Mojtaba Khamenei
decapitationTracker.replacement: N/A — he IS the replacement. Zolghadr named SNSC secretary D24 = institutional continuity without visible leader.
decapitationTracker.significance: 27 days absent. Written statement only (D13). No video. Speculation: injured, hiding, or dead. Regime functioning without visible head of state.

decapitationTracker.name: Maj Gen Majid Khademi
decapitationTracker.role: IRGC Intelligence Chief (effectively No.2 in IRGC)
decapitationTracker.replacement: No confirmed successor. IRGC intel apparatus decapitated. Coordinated barrage hours later = institutional continuity.
decapitationTracker.significance: Most senior IRGC kill since Khamenei. Intel chief = operational intelligence, counterintel, and covert ops leadership eliminated. Effectively No.2.

decapitationTracker.name: Asghar Bagheri
decapitationTracker.replacement: Killed alongside Khademi in precision strike. Quds Force external ops leadership eliminated.
decapitationTracker.significance: Quds Force = Iran's external operations arm. Combined with Khademi = dual decapitation of intel + external ops.

dealAvailability.reasoning: TRUMP + IRAN ACCEPTED 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE (Apr 7 ~7PM ET, Pakistan-brokered). Trump calls Iran 10-pt 'workable basis.' FM Araghchi confirmed via Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir. VP Vance to lead Islamabad talks Fri. Mediator activity SURGE (Pakistan operational broker). Face-saving elements materialize (Pakistani guarantee, Hormuz coordination). Deal availability JUMP 0.18 -> 0.42. Still short of 0.6 — 2-week pause, not settlement; gap on NPT+sanctions; Israel decoupling risk.
dealAvailability.reasoning_fa: ایران ۱۰ ماده = مفصل‌ترین پاسخ (specificity UP). اما ماکسیمالیست: NPT + تحریم + بازسازی = ماه‌ها. ترامپ رد تمدید. شکاف عمیق‌تر. DOWN 0.22->0.18.

usExitPressure.reasoning: Exit narrative crystallized: Trump can frame 2-week pause as 'Pakistan asked,' 'Hormuz reopening,' 'Iran 10-pt workable basis' — all face-saving exits. Pew 60% wrong still binds. Gas $4.12. 15 KIA. Duration fatigue D39. Wall St likely rally tomorrow. US exit pressure UP 0.57 -> 0.64.
usExitPressure.reasoning_fa: پیو ۵۹٪. ۱۵ کشته. $۴.۱۰. نجات F-15 = PR. بازار صعود. اما ترامپ 'نمی‌دانم.' TACO (4 بار). ۱۰ ماده = ماه‌ها.

iranAcceptance.reasoning: Iran SNSC accepted 2-week ceasefire and agreed to Hormuz reopening coordination via Pakistan mediation — FIRST formal de-escalation step from Tehran in 39 days. Araghchi confirmed on behalf of Supreme National Security Council. Acceptance JUMP 0.08 -> 0.30. Still capped — 10-pt maximalism intact (NPT, sanctions, reparations unresolved), 2-week window = conditional pause not terms acceptance, IRGC 'outside region' rhetoric still live.
iranAcceptance.reasoning_fa: ایران ۱۰ ماده ماکسیمالیست = موضع افتتاحیه مذاکره. NPT + تحریم + بازسازی. طرح آمریکا 'بیش از حد.' سپاه 'درمانده.' DOWN 0.10->0.08. سخت‌تر.

escalationProximity.reasoning: Deadline averted. Power grid strikes SUSPENDED 14 days (0.88 -> 0.25). Hormuz reopening promised (0.67 -> 0.35). Kharg already hit but oil infra spared. Israel decoupling risk = residual (Haaretz source: IDF 'preparing extensive attack'). Escalation proximity DOWN 0.72 -> 0.42. NOT zero — Iran could freeze, Israel could strike unilaterally, Hormuz non-compliance = instant re-trigger.
escalationProximity.reasoning_fa: نیروگاه سه‌شنبه <20 ساعت. P=0.22 UP. ترامپ رد تمدید (0.88). ایران ۱۰ ماده = بدون خروج. IAEA 'deeply concerned' (0.85). تشدید UP 0.68->0.72.

outcomeProbabilities.derivation_negotiated: DOWN from 0.18. Naval blockade = further from diplomacy. No talks. Allies refusing. Nuclear gap unbridgeable.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_escalation: UP from 0.28. Blockade Monday = direct confrontation risk. If Iran resists: naval war. IRGC 'act of war.'
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_protracted: DOWN from 0.38. Blockade accelerates timeline — less likely to remain protracted, more likely collapse or confrontation.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_intervention: UP from 0.10. Allies refusing blockade. China condemning. If maritime confrontation: international pressure surges.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_other: Regime fracture, coup, rogue IRGC action, Houthi Bab al-Mandab closure.

calibration.polymarketSource: Polymarket: ceasefire-holds ~18% (crashing). Deal by Apr 30 ~15-18%. Conflict-ends-Dec31 ~97%. $280M+ traded. Blockade active = bearish signal but Trump 'deal' talk providing floor.

historicalBaseRate.methodology: Of ~40 post-WWII asymmetric Middle East conflicts, ~35% resolved within 45 days (current D37). Base rate prior.

oilFuturesSignal.interpretation: Spot > futures = market expects crisis is TEMPORARY. Consistent with resolution within months, not years.

calibration.modelVsMarket: Model: ~28% negotiated resolution. Market near-term: ~18% ceasefire holds. Model more optimistic than market because of Pakistan 2nd round + Rubio Lebanon track. But blockade enforcement + 7-day countdown = strong bear case.

confidence.methodology: Ensemble: model-derived (15%) + market signal (~20% Polymarket, crashing) + historical base rate (35%) -> weighted 18%. DOWN from 22%. Naval blockade destroyed remaining diplomatic pathway. Allies refusing. No talks scheduled.

deadlineHistory.threat: April 7 Tue 8PM ET power grid strikes — EXPLICITLY REFUSES to extend
deadlineHistory.outcome: BLINKED 4th time. 90 min before 8PM ET Trump announced 2-week ceasefire on conversation with PM Sharif/FM Munir, contingent on Iran reopening Hormuz. Iran SNSC accepted. Peace talks Islamabad Fri (Vance lead).

trumpPattern.methodology: Bayesian: prior P(follow-through) = 0.70. 3 observed blinks → posterior ~0.16. ADJUSTED UP to 0.22 for: (1) Trump explicitly refuses to extend (different signal from 'good chance'), (2) South Pars energy war precedent already set, (3) Iran 10-pt maximalist = no off-ramp, (4) credibility pressure = 4th blink would be devastating, (5) Iran military defiance = no compliance signal.

sensitivity.input: If a credible deal proposal emerges
sensitivity.interpretation: A credible counter-proposal from Iran would have the largest single impact on resolution probability.

sensitivity.input: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate
sensitivity.interpretation: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate (e.g., Hormuz opening offer), probability triples. This is the binding constraint.
US already wants out. More pressure doesn't help much because the bottleneck is deal + Iran acceptance, not US willingness.
Escalation doesn't increase resolution — it changes the TYPE of resolution (forced vs negotiated). Impact on probability is indirect.

sensitivity.input: If Trump follows through on threat
sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution — it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.

incidents.description_fa: محاصره دریایی نیروی دریایی آمریکا ساعت ۱۰ صبح فعال شد. تمام ترافیک دریایی بنادر ایران مسدود. نفتکش تحریمی چینی محاصره را آزمایش کرد.

incidents.description: Iran armed forces threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, AND Red Sea shipping in retaliation for worldwide blockade. Rhetorical — 10-day zero-attack streak intact.
incidents.description_fa: نیروهای مسلح ایران تهدید به مسدود کردن خلیج فارس، دریای عمان و دریای سرخ کردند. ۱۰ روز بدون حمله.

incidents.description_fa: ایران یک‌طرفه تنگه هرمز را ‘باز’ اعلام کرد بدون موافقت آمریکا؛ سردرگمی در کشتیرانی. نفت برای لحظاتی کاهش یافت.

incidents.description_fa: ایران دوباره تنگه هرمز را بست در واکنش به امتناع آمریکا از رفع محاصره؛ عبور به ~۳ فروند کاهش یافت.

incidents.description_fa: نیروی دریایی آمریکا کشتی توسکا را توقیف کرد؛ ایران آن را ‘دزدی دریایی’ خواند و آزادسازی فوری خواست.

incidents.description_fa: قالیباف: ‘کارت‌های جدید در میدان’؛ عارف: خواسته‌های آمریکا ‘کودکانه’؛ ایران دور دوم را رد کرد.

incidents.description_fa: آمریکا دومین کشتی مرتبط با ایران را در دریای عرب توقیف کرد.

incidents.description_fa: ایران هیچ هیئتی به اسلام‌آباد نمی‌فرستد؛ ونس به میز خالی رسید. آتش‌بس ساعت ۸ شب به وقت شرقی منقضی می‌شود.

ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس: 'کافی نیست.' قالیباف: 'ماکسیمالیسم آمریکا.' مذاکرات جدید نیست. آتش‌بس ۲۱ آوریل.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TRUMP DECLARES NAVAL BLOCKADE. CENTCOM: all Iranian port traffic blocked starting Monday 10AM ET. No new peace talks scheduled. UK, France, Spain, Turkey refuse to join. China condemns. Diplomatic isolation deepening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ محاصره دریایی اعلام کرد. سنتکام: بنادر ایران از دوشنبه. مذاکرات جدید نیست. بریتانیا، فرانسه، اسپانیا، ترکیه رد. چین محکوم.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Pakistan offers 2nd Islamabad round; Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon ambassadors Tue
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: پاکستان دور دوم اسلام‌آباد پیشنهاد؛ روبیو میزبان سفرای اسرائیل-لبنان سه‌شنبه
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: First potential Lebanon ceasefire track. Pakistan keeping channel open despite Islamabad collapse.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump 'close to over' (Fox Business) + Iran $270B reparations counter + business internet partial
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ «بسیار نزدیک به پایان» + ضدپیشنهاد ۲۷۰ میلیارد دلار ایران + اینترنت تجاری جزئی
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty are biggest gaps; nuclear 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze still unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Munir (Pakistan army chief) in Tehran with US proposal; Trump announces 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 5PM ET; AP: 'in principle' agreement to extend Iran ceasefire beyond Apr 21
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: منیر (رئیس ارتش پاکستان) در تهران با پیشنهاد آمریکا؛ ترامپ آتش‌بس ۱۰ روزه اسرائیل-لبنان از ۵ بعدازظهر؛ توافق «در اصول» برای تمدید آتش‌بس ایران
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: 'In principle' extension not formally agreed (US official to CNBC). Nuclear gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze, ~440kg HEU stockpile. Hegseth 'restart combat' threat is paired stick. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran declares Hormuz open for commercial transit; US Navy insists blockade on Iranian-linked ships stands; contradictory signals paralyze shipping captains
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران هرمز را برای کشتیرانی تجاری باز اعلام کرد؛ آمریکا می‌گوید محاصره بنادر ایرانی ادامه دارد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Semantic gap on what 'open' means. Iran: all transit free. US: only non-Iranian-linked ships. Ship operators stay anchored. No direct US-Iran talks. 4 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran re-closes Hormuz after US refuses to lift naval blockade; Hormuz transit collapses to ~3 vessels/day; Iran warns ships to stay out
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران هرمز را دوباره بست پس از امتناع آمریکا از رفع محاصره
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Hormuz closure reverses brief Apr 17 relief. Economic warfare resumes in parallel with kinetic ceasefire. 3 days to Apr 21 expiry. Nuclear / enrichment demands remain fully unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: US seizes M/V Touska; Iran demands release, calls it piracy, vows retaliation; Iran FM says no delegation to Pakistan
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: آمریکا توسکا را توقیف کرد؛ ایران آن را دزدی دریایی خواند و هیئتی به پاکستان نمی‌فرسد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Ship seizure most provocative US action since D1. Iran refuses Round 2. 2 days to expiry. Hormuz closed. 25 ships turned back. Touska crew in US custody. Ceasefire kinetically intact but politically on life-support.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran formally refuses Round 2 talks; Ghalibaf 'new cards on battlefield'; VP Aref 'US demands impossible'; Trump 'maybe I won't extend it — have to start dropping bombs again'
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران رسماً دور دوم مذاکرات را رد کرد؛ قالیباف هشدار داد؛ ترامپ تهدید جنگ داد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Both sides escalating rhetoric. Iran no-show at Islamabad. Trump bombing threat. Nuclear gap: Iran wants 20-yr enrichment right; US wants zero enrichment. 1 day to Apr 21 expiry. IRGC pre-positioning.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: EXPIRY DAY: Vance + Witkoff + Kushner arrive Islamabad; Iran sends no delegation; Trump 'highly unlikely' to extend; ceasefire expires 8PM ET; second US ship seizure Arabian Sea
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: روز انقضا: ونس به اسلام‌آباد رسید؛ ایران غایب؛ ترامپ: تمدید ‘بسیار بعید است’؛ آتش‌بس ساعت ۸ شب منقضی می‌شود
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Vance at empty table. Iran FM: 'no negotiations under threat of force.' Nuclear / HEU / enrichment / Hormuz reopening — all gaps unresolved. Ceasefire expires 8PM ET. War likely resumes D54.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely at Pakistan's request; Iran silent — no delegation, no proposal, Vance trip cancelled
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ آتش‌بس را به‌درخواست پاکستان به‌صورت نامحدود تمدید کرد؛ ایران سکوت کرد — هیچ هیئتی، هیچ پیشنهادی
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran refuses to submit 'unified proposal' while blockade continues. Trump: extension holds until proposal submitted and 'discussions concluded one way or the other.' Iran FM: 'No negotiations under shadow of threats.' Internal Iran fracture: Khamenei hardliners vs. Araghchi pragmatists. Nuclear enrichment gap remains fundamental — US zero enrichment vs. Iran 20-yr right. Oil +5.1% reflects market skepticism.

ceasefireEconomicRecovery.note: Hormuz re-closed Apr 18 after brief Apr 17 'opening' confusion. Touska seized Apr 19, Tifani boarded Apr 22 — 3rd US maritime action. Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely Apr 21 at Pakistan request — Brent spikes $98.60 (+5.1%) as peace-talk hope fades. Iran internet Day 54 — selective 'Internet Pro' paid scheme expanding; $1.8B+ total shutdown cost. Rial ~1.35M/USD (est). Brent range D46–D54: $89.50–$102.00. Hormuz: 3 vessels/day (96% below pre-war 135). ⚠ ceasefireMode.enabled=true — ceasefire extended indefinitely; user should update expiresAt field.

branchExtend.detail: Most likely if framework but no final agreement. Pakistan mediates.

branchDeal.detail: Mine clearance, insurance normalization, escorts resume.

branchCollapse.detail: Immediate return to pre-ceasefire dynamics. Worse — broken trust amplifies.
Worse than before — broken ceasefire = higher risk premium.

branchStalled.detail: Talks stall, Hormuz slow, both sides posturing.
Tension builds. Markets re-price war risk.
